description.ko: 첨단 기술과 거친 지하 세계가 만나는 미래 도시의 풍경을 생생한 네온 사인과 홀로그램 광고로 구현한 고해상도 비주얼입니다.
description.en: A hyper-detailed visualization of a futuristic urban landscape where advanced technology meets the gritty underworld, illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain reflecting vibrant neon pink and cyan lights on wet asphalt, towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, flying cars weaving through traffic, high-tech urban decay, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric fog, synthwave aesthetic, intricate metal structures.
